nonGoals: Do not modify scorer.go, pipeline.go, or domain types
Do not change N/A rendering logic
Do not add new report output formats
Do not modify other report files
objective: Guard the records loop in internal/report/health.go and use a counted denominator for pass rate and average score, adding the analysis import.
planText: Add `"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis"` import. In `Health()`: add a `counted` variable initialized to 0; at top of the records loop, guard with `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }`; increment `counted` after guard; replace `len(records)` denominator with `counted` for `PassRate` and `AverageScore` calculations; add a check for `counted == 0` to avoid division by zero, returning appropriate N/A values if no supported records.

nonGoals: Do not modify scorer.go, pipeline.go, or domain types

Do not introduce counted denominator (per-dimension/language counts already handle it)
objective: Guard two aggregation loops in internal/report/detailed.go to skip unsupported records, adding the analysis import.
planText: Add `"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis"` import. In `computeDimensionAverages()`: at top of the records loop, add `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` before summing dimensions and incrementing counts. In `computeLanguageBreakdowns()`: at top of its records loop, add the same guard before per-language accumulation.

objective: Guard the buildLanguageDetail loop in internal/report/full.go to skip unsupported records, adding the analysis import.
planText: Add `"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis"` import. In `buildLanguageDetail()`: at top of the records loop, add `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` before computing per-language sums and counts.

nonGoals: Do not modify scorer.go, pipeline.go, or domain types

objective: Guard the GenerateCard loop in internal/report/card.go and use a counted denominator for total units, pass rate, and overall score.
planText: In `GenerateCard()`: add a `counted` variable initialized to 0; at top of the records loop, add `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }`; increment `counted` after guard; replace `len(records)` denominator with `counted` for `TotalUnits`, `PassRate`, and `OverallScore` calculations; handle `counted == 0` edge case to avoid division by zero, ensuring overall score becomes N/A when no supported records exist.
